counters.description: tips: w his passive-aa. dodge inwards when he q's. early bramble vest can be good. either insta e or don't e at all if he hits w, if you wait and e at the wrong time, you will get pulled back and die. he can also interrupt your e with his qs.
tips: w her passive-aa (easy if you always w when she recasts e). taunt reveals her from shroud. flash her r2. passive shield her q-poke.
tips: don't e in unless she wasted abilities. passive shield her e's. always try to dodge her q. turn around when taunt durations ends to dodge her r if she's spamming it. her w stops your r.
tips: never e in if he has e up. take short trades and don't give him 5 stacks of passive. predict his q-(stridebreaker)-flash when you're low hp and e/flash towards him to dodge q sweet spot.

tips: your w blocks vital hits and her q. stand against wall if you want to fight her ult. bramble vest is good. dodge her w at all costs, the as slow is too strong. your e vs her w is mostly mind game, you can hold it and wait for her to use w first.

tips: passive shield his q and e poke. w every q you can (prevents grasp). when you e in, always kill his barrel on first aa and then focus him. even if he w's perfectly your auto will hit barrel first.
tips: passive shield his q and aa poke. w to stop his w 3rd stack. stand away from walls to prevent r stun. don't engage when he's about to transform.

tips: w her w-aa. learn to dodge her e or dodge the game. if you get hit by e, instantly run away from spirit range. dodge tentacles by moving straight at a 90 degree angle. when she r's, just disengage.

tips: your w blocks his r-enhanced aa and his cannonw-aas. passive shield his q and aa poke. engage when he transform from hammer to cannon, because then he doesn't have access to knockback-e during the trade.
tips: don't fight her unless you get a gank. passive shield and w her q and aa poke to stay healthy while farming. only engage if she wastes w somehow.

tips: w blocks his passive w-aa. dodge or passive shield his q poke. you can e him when he e's and he can't do anything except follow your champion (no aas in lightning form). this can be used to pull him under tower.
tips: don't e in. dodge or passive shield her q and e poke. w her empowered w-aa. e backwards through her when she ults. this is literally the worst matchup for shen.
tips: he beats basically every all-in, so basically you should never e in. passive shield his q poke. use w when he w's.
tips: passive shield his q poke. insta w when he w's. remember that e gives him invulnerability from one-side only.
tips: passive shield when you go to last hit a minion. your w blocks her passive mark aa. she gets taunted if she e's your e.
tips: w is best used if he overheats, because it blocks his empowered aas. passive shield his q and e poke whenever possible. immediately e away from his r.
tips: use q-w when he e's you. dodge his w sweet spot at all costs. he can w-flash at last second to redirect the cone. very difficult matchup, but winnable if you are the better player.
tips: passive shield his qs and w his aas. play patiently and look for gank opportunities.
tips: prevent her from hitting 3 w-stacks on you by blocking aas with your w. play patiently. if she wastes e you punish with a trade (if you have the hp for it).
tips: your w blocks his q if you are the first target it hits. his e acts as a cleanse from your taunt if it's timing out.

synergies.description: i've abused the shen + kha'zix combo for multiple years with my friend tanu, who's a challenger jungler from finland. kha ults, shen ults, you appear together in the enemy backline, shen taunts everyone and kha'zix oneshots the highest priority target. i'm convinced this is one of the best top and jungle duoq combinations.

nocturne is an amazing jungler to have on your team as shen (and you definitely don't want him on the opposing team because he can block your ultimate). the synergy in their ultimate abilities is self-evident and nocturne players will enjoy delivering you to the enemy backline.

there's just something about this champion that works well with shen. i swear it's impossible to lose when you have a nunu on your team. there is also a large statistical correlation here which you can confirm on whichever league statistics platform you prefer.
the shencarim™ delivery system will never fail to deliver a willing ninja to the enemy backline. available now at champion selects near you.
olaf loves going in. stand united gives olaf a shield to survive the burst, so now he's immune to cc and to damage. this combination wreaks havoc if olaf gets ahead early on.

kayn dives into the enemy backline, shen ults him, kayn ults the highest priority target, shen spams e. when stand united finishes casting, shen will appear inside kayn's target and if you spam e, you will taunt the target with no counterplay. very good strategy.
similar to kha'zix, evelynn can sneak in to the enemy backline and deliver a shen from stealth. strong combination.
rengar can deliver shen to the enemy backline, and shen's ultimate allows rengar to sustain more damage than usual. similar to evelynn and kha'zix.
